data.title: As Boeing Workers Enter Second Month Of Strike, Rival Airbus Reportedly Plans To Cut 2,500 Jobs
data.description: The European aerospace leader plans to implement these reductions, representing 7% of the division's workforce, by mid-2026.

data.title: Synchrony Financial Q3 Earnings: 29% Profit Growth, Raised FY24 Forecast & More
data.description: Synchrony Financial reported strong Q3 results, with net interest income of $4.609 billion and net revenue of $3.814 billion. EPS exceeded expectations and outlook was raised to $8.45-$8.55.

data.title: Stellantis Recalls Nearly 21K Plug-In Hybrid SUVs In US Over Concerns Of Brake Pedal Disengaging
data.description: Stellantis NV is recalling 20,755 plug-in hybrid SUVs in the U.S. citing concerns that they may have been built with a brake pedal that could disengage when braking.
